nasb.text: Say to the righteous that it will go well with them, For they will eat the fruit of their actions.

esv.text: Tell the righteous that it shall be well with them, for they shall eat the fruit of their deeds.

cnv.text: 你們要告訴義人，他們必得福樂， 因為他們必享自己行為所結的果子。

ccb.text: 要告诉义人：他们有福了， 必得善报。

csbs.text: 你们要告诉义人，他们会一切平顺， 因为他们必吃自己行为所结的果实。
